name: stall-survey
description: On-demand triage of blocked tasks in ROADMAP.md. Scans for [!]-tagged items and walks the user through each one interactively.

scan.name: Scan Blocked Tasks
scan.description: Reads ROADMAP.md and extracts all [!]-tagged blocked tasks into a structured list.

blocked.description: JSON array of blocked task objects: [{text, reason, line}]

triage.name: Triage
triage.description: Interactively walks the user through each blocked task. Options: unblock-with-context, defer, drop, or retry-as-is. Edits ROADMAP.md and commits.

resolved.description: Number of blocked tasks resolved (unblocked or dropped)

deferred.description: Number of blocked tasks left as [!] (deferred for later)
